result: All done. `struct wpa_scan_res` in `src/drivers/driver.h` now has `sig.qual`/`sig.noise` replacing the old `qual`/`noise` fields, and every usage across the tree (scan.c, bss.c, events.c, driver_bsd.c, driver_nl80211_scan.c, driver_wext.c) was updated accordingly — `struct wpa_bss`'s own separate `qual`/`noise` fields were correctly left untouched. Verified with a full `wpa_supplicant/` build (via a Docker toolchain matched to this codebase's era, since the host's OpenSSL 3 / missing Linux headers made a native build impossible) covering wext, nl80211, and D-Bus code paths — build exits clean with no errors.
